title: rathbunia treleasei
intro: Rathbunia treleasei, also known as Mountain Fleabane, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is primarily recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly in its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, which can help in soothing wounds and reducing pain. The health benefits of Rathbunia treleasei include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, salves, or infusions, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
